chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CONST. PETITION No. D-1938 OF 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing on CMA No. 9716/2017 2. For hearing on CMA No. 9717/2017 3. For hearing of Main Case 27.09.2021. None present for the Petitioner..... None present for the Petitioner. Same was the position on 08.03.2019. No intimation is available on record. Petition is pending since 2017, however, the Petitioner is reluctant to advance the cause of these proceedings. Petition alongwith listed applications stands dismissed for non-prosecution. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Amjad/PS
